question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Lyon–Saint Exupéry Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-02-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07481.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-02-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-01-22) was 11.625. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Lyon–Saint Exupéry Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - LYON-ST EXUPERY - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07481.D.
